full_text:
Quan Duan 全端
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Quan Duan (全端). Defended Shouchun during Zhuge Dan’s rebellion, but surrendered to Wei. Quan Duan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
